ie.updateNote: Following the escalation of the situation in the Middle-East, the Austrian Interior Ministry has raised the terrorist alert level to 4 / “high”, the second highest level in Austria. Irish citizens in Austria are advised to exercise caution and follow the advice of local authorities. You can contact the emergency services in Austria by dialling 112 or contact the Irish Embassy in Vienna at +43 1 71
